title: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) - Password Change
proof: GET /vulnerabilities/csrf/?password_new=hacked123&password_conf=hacked123&Change=Change successfully changed the admin password to 'hacked123' without any CSRF token or anti-CSRF mechanism. The form uses GET method and has no token validation. Successfully re-authenticated with new password, then restored original.
poc_steps: Victim visits this URL (e.g., via tag or malicious link)
